最终证据摘要: Top1 remains neutral aromatic (0.55) and top2 remains ICT (0.24). I interpret the verifier result as operational failure, not chemical evidence: it returned zero usable evidence cards due to a token/credit constraint, so it neither supports nor undermines the current leader. This verifier result does not reduce any portfolio coverage debt, because portfolio screening was already complete and no screened alternative is reopened. No still-credible portfolio hypothesis remains untested; ICT remains the only still-credible alternative, but it is only indirectly weakened rather than decisively excluded. The case therefore legitimately remains in pairwise contraction rather than reverting to portfolio screening. Closure justification is still collecting, not sufficient, because verifier supplementation for neutral aromatic versus ICT is still missing. With 13 rounds remaining including the current one, the budget is ample, so the case is not ready for decisive finalize or best-available finalize and should receive one more bounded follow-up, specifically a narrower verifier supplement rather than repeating the same internal parse route.
